name: python3-tk
title: python3-tk
summary: Tkinter - Writing Tk applications with Python 3.x
description:
Tkinter - Writing Tk applications with Python 3.x
A module for writing portable GUI applications with Python 3.x using Tk.
Also known as Tkinter. Debian breaks out the Tkinter module from the Python
standard library to reduce the dependency footprint.
.
The package currently depends on python3.13-tk and python3.14-tk. In the
future, dependencies on jython (Python for a JVM) and ironpython (Python for
Mono) may be added.
.
Note that this package will not force the installation of all supported Python
interpreters, it only makes sure that the modules are available.
